title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF TUBOG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAUBAN, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, TO SAN GABRIEL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5212 / 53 OG No. 16, 5137 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1692, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF TUBOG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAUBAN, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, TO SAN GABRIEL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Tubog in the Municipality of Mauban, Province of Quezon, is hereby changed to San Gabriel.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
